item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431-Metasploit-exploit: Automated Metasploit post-exploitation module for CVE-2026-31431 ("Copy Fail"). Weaponizes a deterministic logic flaw in the Linux kernel AF_ALG subsystem to achieve local privilege escalation (LPE) to root by safely corrupting a setuid binary directly in the shared Page Cache (RAM) without modifying files on disk

item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-46333: Research on `pidfd_getfd(2)`-based file descriptor leakage from privileged SUID processes. Demonstrates race-condition FD capture against OpenSSH `ssh-keysign` and exposure of sensitive root-owned file handles.
CVE-2026-46333: CVE-2026-46333
